content:
Hi everyone,

First off — a huge thank you! We've successfully collected all the Pontos terms you translated and applied them in-game via MTL. **Contributors will be individually credited in our contributions list. 🎉
**
<:aurita_beg2:1407642015428116541> **A Known Issue We Want to Address**

We've noticed that our **machine translator sometimes fails to apply your translated terms correctly**. We know how frustrating it is to put in the work translating terms, only to see them still appear as MTL in-game. We're sorry!! this is a current technical limitation of the MTL system.

**Here's what we're doing about it:**

**1. Upgrading the MTL system**

We're working with our dev team to upgrade the machine translator, then re-running previous skill descs in bulk so your terms apply more reliably.

We'll also **release the source text for Pontos and Saya here** for interested volunteers to work on, once Pontos is released.

**2. Giving volunteers earlier access to new character content**

We know you want to actually work on the latest characters, not just feed terms into an MTL black box. 
So I am pushing internally to share skill descriptions and voicelines for new characters directly with volunteers, ahead of MTL. Because honestly, no machine translator can match what you can do.

<:celeste_pray:1408324281624170566> **Why This Matters (and Why We Need Your Help)**

We want your hard work to actually show up in the game the way you intended. The best way to make that happen is to **give volunteers more direct access to the source material, and deepen the collaboration overall.**

But to do this,** we absolutely need everyone to respect the NDA.** 

Recently, some leaks have made it harder for us to justify expanding access. Some people have been sharing discussions in this server outside and saying negative stuff about fellow volunteers. Some people are telling others "I have internal access to latest content". Please do not do this.🥲 

We don't want a few people to ruin this opportunity for the whole community, and that's why we reinstated the rules in the latest announcement. **Repeat offenders will be removed from the project.
**
**How We'll Roll This Out**

We'll start by **extending this earlier access to trusted, long-time volunteers** first, then gradually expand as trust is built. If you've been with us a while and want to be part of this, keeping the NDA airtight is the single most important thing you can do.

Thank you all again — we're genuinely excited about where this collaboration can go. 💛

Sorry I missed your question yesterday, Riddle!!
We were working overtime (& I'm still working overtime today so)...

Ebwynnos / 厄波扬斯 is a name I coined with Pontos's writer. The English is spelled to sound like 厄波扬斯 phonetically (Eb-wyn-nos ≈ è-bō-yáng-sī), while each language carries its own layer of meaning:

厄波扬斯 — 厄 (peril) + 波 (wave) + 扬 (surging) evokes Pontos's abyssal, primordial sea energy.
Ebwynnos — "Eb-" hints at ebb (the receding tide). "-wynn-" is Welsh/Celtic for blessed/holy, nodding to Nodens, the Celtic healing god. "-nos" echoes Greek names like Kronos and Okeanos.

I really do wish we could interact with volunteers more and share source materials earlier. The honest truth is we've consistently been finishing patches in the last few days before release and crunching hard, which has made it really difficult to open things up the way we'd like.

Our team is slowly expanding, so hopefully down the line we'll have the breathing room to do this properly... it may take a few more months, but I have hope!

I'll do everything I can to make sure our trusted volunteers get to work on more of the latest content, that we can answer your questions here more often, and that your volunteer work feels genuinely rewarding.
(We just need to crunch less. And I need to stop getting banned from my main account <:lmfao:1408867314497228941>

Thank you! So upon looking at the key terms without context we actually localized it as an archaic thing like "Lands of the Wylde Tide/Hunt"

Since the word has meaningful etymology it appears there was even more sense to make it "telling/evocative" in localizatiin

I have managed to pursuade us to like send more people to back me up on this so the heavy burden of compiling won't fall on Mercy's shoulders alone (I think. I mean, when I said that, Light didn't say no)
like we technically need a Project Manager on our end
That... explains a lot.
Hopefully it happens!
I know burden on a single volunteer would be immense as well. So for me I need no rush from Mercy! We all do have our own stuff to take care of <3
Thank you so much for being patient with us!!
oh still one question I currently having. Before the next update, does PRs still able to be collected before the update?
I will try my best to put in more PRs right before the update if it is still available for collection!
